scope: Settle the F-T01.4 Open question: enumerate every INSERT into TMS_EXTSYSEVENTCALL across .scr/.scp/.cs/.cpp/.h/.sql/.xml; for each, trace upstream callers and determine whether any T04 WCF op can drive the insert. Confirm whether TDMSAPConnector inserts (it does not, UPDATE-only) and whether any DB-side trigger/SP cascades into the table (none found).

nodes_added.name: _ncmRefintTDM_LISTDeleteLast.scr main(sListId, ...)
nodes_added.summary: Refint hook on TDM_LIST delete (@Calling-position: Skript wird von Refint aufgerufen, wenn eine Werkzeugliste gelöscht wird). Reads system parameter NCM_ONLISTDELETE[1]; if == 1 archive+delete branch (line 133 INSERT), if == 2 delete-everything branch (line 206 INSERT). Both INSERTs use $['] apostrophe-doubling escape. Dispatched by tlsRefInt — caller chain is mask-driven (only mask state-machines issue delete from TDM_LIST in the repo).

nodes_added.name: _ncmChangeStateNCMFile.scp main(sMaskObjectId, sCallScriptPosition, ...)
nodes_added.summary: NCM file-state-change helper. Header @Calling-position: tdmList. INSERT at line 34 (inside RemoveFileFromProd helper) uses $['] escape. Triggered only from tdmList mask state transitions.

nodes_added.name: tdt_Test_CreateExportEvent.scp main(sExportArea, sExportId)
nodes_added.summary: TDT export-queue helper. INSERT at line 26 uses bare $(null)sExportArea / $(null)sExportId — NO apostrophe-doubling, unlike all other 5 INSERT sites. Callers all pass mask-scope IDs not user free-text, so today not exploitable via wire; F-T08.2 flags as defence-in-depth gap.

nodes_added.name: tdt_Test_ExportTool.scp main(sToolId)
nodes_added.summary: SAD-installed mask-button entry on tdmTool. Header documents the install SQL (TMS_USEREVENT row with USERID='SAD', EVENTTYPE=0, FLAGS=1). CallScript at line 54 invokes tdt_Test_CreateExportEvent with literal area='TOOL' and sToolId from $TDM_TOOL.TOOLID mask scope. NOT in any WCF op's script catalog.

nodes_added.name: tdt_Test_ExportList.scp main(sListId)
nodes_added.summary: Sibling of tdt_Test_ExportTool, same SAD-installed pattern on tdmList. CallScript at line 54 passes area='LIST'.

nodes_added.name: tdt_Test_ExportComp.scp main(sCompId)
nodes_added.summary: Sibling of tdt_Test_ExportTool, same SAD-installed pattern on tdmComp. CallScript at line 54 passes area='COMP'.

nodes_added.name: tdmList mask — NCM state-change INSERT branch
nodes_added.summary: Inline mask-event SQL in tdmList state-transition handler. INSERT at line 7640 uses $['] escape throughout. Triggered by user state-change action on a tool-list; nFlag2Service==1 branch (Service-flagged transitions). UI-only.

nodes_added.name: tdmList mask — NCM file-delete-with-service INSERT branch
nodes_added.summary: Inline mask-event SQL in tdmList file-delete handler. INSERT at line 8252 uses $['] escape. Gated by THISUSER==SAD short-circuit at line 8210 — SAD-only path. UI-only.

nodes_added.name: TDMSAPConnector.exe Main(args[])
nodes_added.summary: CLI executable. Takes 4 mandatory args (dbconnection, extsysid, extsyseventid, extsyseventcallnr) identifying an existing TMS_EXTSYSEVENTCALL row. SELECTs login data + PARAM rows for the row, calls SAP BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE, UPDATEs the parent row at line 207 with the result. DOES NOT INSERT. Confirmed by grep insert Program.cs returning zero hits.

nodes_added.name: All script-level INSERT INTO TMS_EXTSYSEVENTCALL call sites
nodes_added.summary: Synthetic node aggregating the 6 INSERT sites: _ncmRefintTDM_LISTDeleteLast.scr:133, :206; _ncmChangeStateNCMFile.scp:34; tdt_Test_CreateExportEvent.scp:26; tdmList.xml:7640, :8252. Five of six use $['] escape; one (tdt_Test_CreateExportEvent) uses bare $(null) — see F-T08.2.

nodes_added.name: TDMSAPConnector UPDATE call site
nodes_added.summary: The only kernel-side write to TMS_EXTSYSEVENTCALL. UPDATE, not INSERT — sets STATE/MSG/RETURNCODE/RETURNTEXT on the row identified by the 3 CLI-arg PKs after the SAP call returns.

edges_added.annotation: nOnListDelete==1 branch (line 133) and ==2 branch (line 206); uses $['] escape; INSERT-from-SELECT (column values come from joined query, not bare param splicing).
RemoveFileFromProd helper line 34; uses $['] escape throughout; main() called from tdmList mask state-transition only.
Line 26 INSERT uses bare $(null) — apostrophe-doubling NOT applied. Defence-in-depth gap per F-T08.2; not exploitable today because callers are SAD mask-buttons passing mask-scope IDs.
tdmList.xml:7640 inline SQL; $['] escape applied; user-action triggered on tdmList state transition where nFlag2Service==1.
tdmList.xml:8252 inline SQL; $['] escape applied; gated by THISUSER==SAD short-circuit at line 8210.
Program.cs:207 — UPDATE only, sets RETURNCODE/RETURNTEXT/STATE on existing row identified by CLI args extsysid/extsyseventid/extsyseventcallnr.
VERIFIED ABSENT — grep insert Program.cs returns zero hits. SAP connector consumes pre-existing rows; never creates them. Row creator is integrator-side, outside this repo.
VERIFIED ABSENT — none of the 12 iMMS5 scripts (per T01.c catalog) reach an INSERT into TMS_EXTSYSEVENTCALL.
VERIFIED ABSENT — the 6 p{ServiceModName}{Op}.scr fixed names have zero shipped matches per F-T01.4; even if matched, no chain reaches an INSERT.
VERIFIED ABSENT — per T12 the additional ITdmMmsToolData ops dispatch scripts that don't reach this table either.
VERIFIED ABSENT — IDatabseImportExport is a named-pipe SQL proxy that doesn't dispatch scripts (per F-T01.4).
Not invoked by any WCF op. Installed as TMS_USEREVENT mask-button on tdmTool restricted to USERID='SAD' (see header line 22-36 of the .scp file).
tdmList is a UI mask form, not a WCF operation. No WCF dispatch enters mask events directly.
